task_completion.description: Audio files are imported to the 4 tracks and the 2 required buses are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Ardour editor window, waveforms should be visible on the Host, Guest, Music_Bed, and SFX tracks. Additionally, two new bus tracks named 'Dialogue_Stem' and 'Music_Stem' should be visible in the editor or mixer window.

task_completion.description: Tracks are correctly routed to their respective buses and disconnected from the Master bus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Audio Connection Manager (routing matrix) or at the bottom of the mixer strips, Host and Guest outputs should be connected to Dialogue_Stem. Music_Bed and SFX outputs should be connected to Music_Stem. The direct connections from the 4 source tracks to the Master bus must be removed.

task_completion.description: Gain and pan values are set correctly for all tracks and buses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the mixer window, fader levels should read: Host (0.0), Guest (-3.0), Music_Bed (-14.0), SFX (-8.0), Dialogue_Stem (-1.0), Music_Stem (-6.0). Pan knobs should show Guest slightly right (25%), SFX hard left (100%), and all others centered.

task_completion.description: Gain automation is drawn on the Music_Bed track to duck under dialogue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the editor window, the automation lane for 'Music_Bed' (Fader/Gain) should be visible, showing a line graph that dips down at 2 seconds, stays flat until 12 seconds, rises back to 0dB at 14 seconds, dips again at 16 seconds, and rises back to 0dB at 26 seconds.

task_completion.description: Location markers are added at the correct timestamps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Location Markers ruler at the top of the editor window, markers named 'Cold_Open', 'Interview_Start', 'Deep_Dive', and 'Outro' should be visible at approximately 0:00, 0:05, 0:14, and 0:26 respectively.

task_completion.description: The required stems and full mix are exported to the delivery directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ardour Export dialog should show 'dialogue_stem', 'music_stem', and 'full_mix' selected for export, OR a file manager/terminal window should show the files 'dialogue_stem.wav', 'music_stem.wav', and 'full_mix.wav' present in '/home/ga/Audio/podcast_delivery/'.

task_completion.description: A session snapshot named 'EP12_Final_Mix' is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Snapshot' dialog should be visible with the name 'EP12_Final_Mix' entered, OR the main Ardour window title bar should update to show 'EP12_Final_Mix' as the active snapshot name.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Ardour GUI to perform the mixing tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour application open with the agent clicking faders, routing matrices, automation lanes, and menus, rather than just running terminal scripts to modify the session XML.

integrity.description: The agent used Ardour's export functionality to generate the WAV files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour 'Export' dialog being configured and run, rather than the agent using the terminal to 'touch' empty files with the required names in the delivery directory.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply open the mixing_notes.txt file and stop.
integrity.visual_evidence: While the agent may open mixing_notes.txt to read instructions, the majority of the screenshots must show active work within the Ardour application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Buses required: 'Dialogue_Stem', 'Music_Stem'. Routing: Host & Guest -> Dialogue_Stem; Music_Bed & SFX -> Music_Stem. Source tracks must NOT route directly to Master. Gains: Host=0dB, Guest=-3dB, Music_Bed=-14dB, SFX=-8dB, Dialogue_Stem=-1dB, Music_Stem=-6dB (tolerance ±1.5dB). Pans: Guest=25% Right, SFX=100% Left, others Center. Automation (Music_Bed): 0s/0dB, 2s/-18dB, 12s/-18dB, 14s/0dB, 16s/-18dB, 26s/0dB. Markers: Cold_Open (0:00), Interview_Start (0:05), Deep_Dive (0:14), Outro (0:26). Exports: dialogue_stem.wav, music_stem.wav, full_mix.wav in /home/ga/Audio/podcast_delivery/. Snapshot: 'EP12_Final_Mix'.
